addition.item: Plugin icon bundled in the package and shown in the Joomla Extensions manager.

feature.item: Four independent switches to choose which events trigger the purge: article create, update, state change (publish/unpublish/trash) and delete. All on by default.

security.item: Defensive hardening: rawurlencode of the zone in the API URL and stripping of control characters from the token (anti header-injection).
SHA-256 integrity hash added to the update server so Joomla verifies the downloaded package.

addition.item: Joomla Update System integration for one-click updates.

note.item: First release: purge the Cloudflare cache on article save / state change / delete.
